top_signals.title: Truckload’s shrinking miles
top_signals.summary:
Supply chain adaptations have led to diminishing distances for truckloads. The shrinking length of haul has mitigated some of the recent market capacity shortfalls.

The post Truckload’s shrinking miles appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan coastlines under tsunami advisory after strong quake off Philippines
top_signals.summary: The advisory was issued for coastal areas in Ibaraki, Chiba, Tokyo, Kanagawa, Shizuoka, Aichi, Mie, Wakayama, Kochi, Miyazaki, Kagoshima and Okinawa prefectures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Harry's and Coterie owner Mammoth Brands has ambitions to be the next CPG giant
top_signals.summary: Mammoth's direct-to-consumer brands have helped upend the razor, diaper and deodorant categories.

top_signals.title: India's viral 'Cockroach' party has millions of followers. What investors need to know
top_signals.summary: A Gen Z-led, social media-first mock political party in India that has amassed millions of followers and is set to hold an in-person protest on Saturday.

top_signals.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
top_signals.summary: Investors seeking steady income can bolster their portfolios by adding dividend stocks with attractive yields.

top_signals.title: Peru’s economic miracle is at stake as voters head to polls
top_signals.summary: The Latin American nation remains one of the region's fastest-growing economies, with growth outpacing most of its peers and a stable currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
